{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Awakened tigers
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The tiger statues at the mansion are [[Awakened]] and can move of their own volition.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
